title: Amarok New Board Chair
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is pleased to announce Dr. Barbara Qasuġlana Amarok is the new Chair of the Board of Directors effective June 1, 2019. She was selected for the leadership position as part of the annual Board reorganization process following the 45 th Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Dr. Amarok brings strong experience and advanced education to successfully lead SNC into the futu...
